summary: Nominal cooling capacity 1056 kW

title: LSBLG300D/R4E evaporator flow rate
summary: Evaporator water flow rate 182 m³/h

title: High pressure switch setting
summary: Exhaust high pressure protection set to 1.14 MPa

title: Low pressure switch setting
summary: Suction low pressure protection set to 0.18 MPa

title: Oil pressure differential protection setting
summary: Oil pressure differential protection set to 0.16 MPa

title: Suction-discharge pressure differential setting
summary: Suction-discharge pressure differential set to 0.4 MPa

title: Chilled water outlet temperature range
summary: Chilled water outlet temperature 3-17 °C

title: Cooling water inlet temperature range
summary: Cooling water inlet temperature 23-35 °C

title: Operating ambient temperature range
summary: Operating ambient temperature 0-40 °C

title: Storage temperature range
summary: Storage temperature -40 to 55 °C

title: Water flow rate tolerance
summary: Water flow rate within ±30% of standard flow

title: Fault: chilled water flow loss
summary: Chilled water flow loss triggers alarm and unit shutdown

structured_payload.description: 当管路系统中循环水停止流动或流量过低时，靶式流量控制器内开关动作，控制系统声光报警，机组将分别停机。

evidence_quote: 循环水断水：当管路系统中循环水停止流动或流量过低时，该循环管路上靶式流量控制器内开关①动作，控制系统声光报警，机组将分别停机。

title: Fault: cooling water flow loss
summary: Cooling water flow loss triggers alarm and unit shutdown

structured_payload.description: 当管路系统中冷却水停止流动或流量过低时，冷却水管路上的靶式流量控制器内开关动作，控制系统将声光报警，机组将分别停机。

evidence_quote: 冷却水断水：当管路系统中冷却水停止流动或流量过低时，冷却水管路上的靶式流量控制器内开②关动作，控制系统将声光报警，机组将分别停机。

title: Fault: chilled water outlet temperature too low
summary: Chilled water outlet temperature below 2.8°C triggers alarm and shutdown

structured_payload.description: 当系统冷冻水出口温度低于2.8℃时，控制系统将声光报警，机组将分别停机。

evidence_quote: 冷水出口温度过低：当系统冷水出口温度低于③ 2.8℃时，控制系统将声光报警，机组将分别停机

title: Fault: suction/discharge pressure out of range
summary: Discharge pressure >1.14 MPa or suction pressure <0.18 MPa triggers alarm and compressor stop

structured_payload.description: 当压缩机排气压力大于设定值或吸气压力低于设定值时,对应保护动作,控制系统给以声光报警，本机头停机。

evidence_quote: 吸排气压力超限：当压缩机排气压力大于设定值或吸气压力低于设定值时① ,对应保护动作 ,控制系统给以声光报警，本机头停机。

title: Fault: motor overload
summary: Compressor motor overheat or overcurrent triggers shutdown

structured_payload.description: 在机头开机运行中，压缩机马达温度过高或运行电流过大，本机组停机。

evidence_quote: ②电机过载保护：在机头开机运行中，压缩机马达温度过高或运行电流过大，本机组停机。

title: Fault: compressor electronic controller protection
summary: Compressor internal electronic controller protection due to motor overheat or high discharge temperature

structured_payload.fault_code: 压缩机电子控制器保护
structured_payload.description: 压缩机内部电子控制器保护，主要影响因素有：压缩机电机过热、压缩机排气温度过高。一旦电子控制器动作，压缩机停机。

evidence_quote: 压缩机④ 电子控制器保护：压缩机内部电子控制器保护，主要影响因素有：压缩机电机过热、压缩机排气温度过高。一旦电子控制器动作，压缩机停机

title: Fault: oil level too low
summary: Oil level switch open for 45 seconds triggers alarm and compressor stop

structured_payload.description: 在机头开机运行中，若油位开关断开时延时45秒，控制系统给以声光报警，机头停机。

evidence_quote: ②  油位过低：在机头开机运行中，若油位开关断开时延时 45秒，控制系统给以声光报警，机头停机。

title: Fault: oil filter differential pressure too high
summary: Oil filter differential pressure switch open for 30 seconds triggers alarm and compressor stop

structured_payload.description: 在机头开机运行中，若油过滤器两侧压差开关断开时延时30秒，控制系统给以声光报警，机头停机。表示油过滤器堵，需清洗。

evidence_quote: ③  油过滤器压差过高：在机头开机运行中，若油过滤器两侧压差开关断开时延时 30秒，控制系统给以声光报警，机头停机。表示油过滤器堵，需清洗。

title: Compressor oil heater preheat before startup
summary: Preheat compressor oil for at least 8 hours before startup

structured_payload.procedure: 机组上电后将压缩机润滑油预热8小时以上

evidence_quote: 机组上电后将压缩机润滑油预热8 小时以上

title: Clean condenser and evaporator every two years
summary: Clean condenser and evaporator at least once every two years using mechanical or chemical methods

structured_payload.procedure: 每两年应对冷凝器和蒸发器至少清洗一次，可采用机械或化学法。

evidence_quote: 每两年应对冷凝器和蒸发器至少清洗一次，可采用机械或化学法。

title: Annual calibration of pressure and temperature sensors
summary: Calibrate pressure and temperature sensors annually

structured_payload.procedure: 每年应对机组的压力传感器和温度传感器校准一次

evidence_quote: 每年应对机组的压力传感器和温度传感器校准一次

title: Startup sequence: pumps, cooling tower, compressor
summary: Start sequence: chilled water pump, then after 30s cooling water pump, after 1min cooling tower fan, after another 1min compressor

structured_payload.sequence: 程序是首先启动循环水泵；延时30秒后冷却水泵启动，1分钟后冷却塔风机启动，再延时1分钟启动压机。

evidence_quote: 程序是首先启动循环水泵；延时 30秒后冷却水泵启动， 1分钟后冷却塔风机启动，再延时 1分钟启动压机。

title: Shutdown sequence: compressor, cooling pump/fan, chilled pump
summary: Stop sequence: compressor first, after 30s stop cooling pump and tower fan, after 3min stop chilled pump

structured_payload.sequence: 首先停主机，延时30秒停冷却水泵和冷却塔风机、再延时3分钟停循环泵。

evidence_quote: 首先停主机，延时 30秒停冷却水泵和冷却塔风机、再延时 3分钟停循环泵。

title: Compressor star-delta start with capacity ramp
summary: Compressor starts in star-delta, 4s transition, runs at 25% capacity for 30s, then 50% for 90s, then PID control

structured_payload.sequence: 机头启动方式为星三角（Y-△）启动，转换时间为4秒。启动时，压缩机25%能量运行30秒，后转入50%能量运行；延时90秒后转入能量PID调节。

evidence_quote: 机头启动方式为星三角（Y -△）启动，转换时间为 4秒。启动时，压缩机 25%能量运行 30秒，后转入 50%能量运行；延时 90秒后转入能量 PID调节。

title: Minimum insulation resistance for compressor motor
summary: Insulation resistance must not be lower than 30 MΩ
evidence_quote: 注意: 绝缘电阻不得低于 30MΩ

title: Power supply requirement
summary: Unit power supply: 3-phase 4-wire 380V±10%, 50Hz
evidence_quote: 注意: 机组电制三相四线制 380V±10% ，50HZ

title: Maximum compressor starts per hour
summary: Do not exceed 6 starts per hour, minimum run time 5 minutes

structured_payload.guidance: 开机次数不得超过6次/小时，且开机运行时间应在5分钟以上。

evidence_quote: 严禁频繁操作各开关，开机次数不得超过 6次/小时，且开机运行时间应在 5分钟以上。

title: Oil level check during operation
summary: Oil level must not be lower than 2/3 of sight glass

structured_payload.guidance: 压缩机视油镜内是否能够充满润滑油，且油位最低不能低于油镜的2/3

evidence_quote: 压缩机视油镜内是否能够充满润滑油，且油位最低不能低于油镜的2/3

title: Discharge superheat range
summary: Discharge superheat should be 10-20°C

title: Suction superheat range
summary: Suction superheat should be 0.5-3°C
